description: The BillboardRenderBufferRenderer component is used as a debug component to determine the states of Photon Dust buffers during the simulation process.

fields.Buffer: The renderer to render point buffers.
fields.Material: The material to render this with.
fields.MotionVectorMode: How to render the object motion vectors.
fields.MinBillboardScreenSize: The minimum size of particles rendered.
fields.MaxBillboardScreenSize: The maximum size of particles rendered.
